productDisplayName: FILA Men Fila Boston White Sports Shoes
description: A perfect blend of fashion and comfort, the fila Boston running shoe comes in a low profile silhouette and is packed with features, making it a great buy for training purposes and casual wear, especially for normal and mild overpronators.UpperHeavily meshed upper with strategically placed synthetic overlays for enhanced breathable comfort and enhanced shoe structureLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue with a textile inner lining for optimum fit and comfortPadded footbed for all-day comfort and impact protection, which is removable to accommodate an orthoticMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and enhanced impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with broad grooved lugs for absolute grip and tractionFlex grooves on the forefoot for easy movementCurved midfoot with a plastic trusstic shank for ergonomic comfortDecoupled and scooped heel for enhanced cushioning to the backfootImpact guidance line to evenly distribute shock and enhance energy returnShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
